description: Ball object representing a single ball in PFC discrete element simulation. Obtained via itasca.ball.create(), itasca.ball.find(), or itasca.ball.list().

methods.name: pos
methods.description: Get ball position as (x, y, z) tuple in model space

methods.name: vel
methods.description: Get ball velocity vector as (vx, vy, vz) tuple. Use vel_x(), vel_y(), vel_z() for individual components.

methods.name: vel_x
methods.description: Get X-component of ball velocity. Returns scalar.

methods.name: vel_y
methods.description: Get Y-component of ball velocity. Returns scalar.

methods.name: vel_z
methods.description: Get Z-component of ball velocity. Returns scalar. Positive Z is typically upward in PFC conventions.

methods.name: set_pos
methods.signature: ball.set_pos(x: float, y: float, z: float) -> None
methods.description: Set ball position to new coordinates. Modifies ball state immediately. May cause overlap with other balls - contacts will update on next cycle. Use with caution during simulation.

methods.name: set_vel
methods.signature: ball.set_vel(vx: float, vy: float, vz: float) -> None
methods.description: Set ball velocity to new values. Modifies ball state immediately.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Delete this ball from the model. Associated contacts are automatically deleted. Ball ID is freed and may be reused. Cannot undo. Use list(it.ball.list()) to create snapshot before deleting during iteration.

methods.name: id
methods.description: Get ball ID number. IDs are unique within the model.
